description: AI-powered threat hunting and incident response MCP server for Elasticsearch/OpenSearch

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.thomasxm/crowdsentinel-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated Elasticsearch hosts. Supports HTTP/HTTPS, local/remote/cloud (e.g., http://localhost:9200, https://es.prod.example.com:9200)
environmentVariables.name: ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS

environmentVariables.description: Elastic Cloud deployment ID (alternative to ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS for cloud deployments)
environmentVariables.name: ELASTICSEARCH_CLOUD_ID

environmentVariables.description: API key for authentication (recommended for production and Elastic Cloud)
environmentVariables.name: ELASTICSEARCH_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Username for basic authentication (alternative to API key)
environmentVariables.name: ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Password for basic authentication (used with ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME)
environmentVariables.name: ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Bearer/service token for authentication (alternative to API key)
environmentVariables.name: ELASTICSEARCH_BEARER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: TLS certificate verification: true (verify CA — production), false (skip — dev/test), or /path/to/ca.crt (custom CA)
environmentVariables.name: VERIFY_CERTS
